firebase.description: Firebase MCP server for Firestore, Auth, Cloud Functions, and Security Rules operations

github.description: GitHub MCP server for repository operations — branches, commits, PRs, issues

context7.description: Context7 MCP server for up-to-date library/API documentation lookups (React Native, Expo, Firebase SDK)

expo.description: Expo SDK 56 docs, build/deploy guidance, EAS configuration

frontend-design.description: UI/UX design system patterns, responsive layout, accessibility, dark mode. Mandatory for all .tsx work.

wiki_manager.description: Keeps wiki/ docs updated. Uses context7 for library API references and firebase for reading Firestore data structures, security rules, and project config to keep documentation accurate.

git_manager.description: Manages git commits, branches, PRs via GitHub plugin.

test_manager.description: Manages Jest testing and coverage reporting. Uses firebase for Firestore security rule validation and emulator testing.

code_review.description: Reviews code using context7 to verify API correctness and firebase to validate Firestore security rules, data model consistency, and backend integration patterns.

documentation.description: Generates documentation with context7-verified API references and firebase-verified Firestore data structures and security rules.
